ddls:
CREATE TABLE "audience_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "speech_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the speech being analyzed */,
  "consideration" TEXT /* Aspect of the audience considered */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score of the speech based on the aspect */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the scores */,
  "remark" TEXT /* Remark on whether the aspect is acceptable or not */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_by" TEXT /* Person who performed the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audience_analysis_speech_id FOREIGN KEY ("speech_id") REFERENCES speeches ("speech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speeches" (
  "speech_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speech */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the speaker who gave the speech */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the speech */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the speech was given */,
  "location" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the speech was given */,
  "speech_type" TEXT /* Type of speech (e.g., keynote, presentation, etc.) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry related to the speech */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the speech */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speech_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speeches_speech_type FOREIGN KEY ("speech_type") REFERENCES speech_type ("speech_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speeches_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speeches_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "speaker_name" TEXT /* Full name of the speaker */,
  "department" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the speaker belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the speaker */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the speaker */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the speaker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speakers_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "speech_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the speech being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the audience (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the audience */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_by" TEXT /* Person who provided the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_speech_id FOREIGN KEY ("speech_id") REFERENCES speeches ("speech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the department headquarters */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of training program (e.g., online, offline, etc.) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training program in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the speaker who enrolled */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training program enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the speaker enrolled in the program */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the speaker completed the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_enrollments_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_enrollments_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speech_type" (
  "speech_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speech type */,
  "speech_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the speech type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the speech type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speech_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topic" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speech_industry" (
  "speech_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the speech */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speech_id", "industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speech_topic" (
  "speech_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the speech */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speech_id", "topic_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the speech being analyzed
